subjects.description: A couple of translucent white stray polythene plastic bags on the snow-packed road, pale and snow-flecked, lightly crumpled and partially lifted by the cold wind
subjects.appearance_details: Thin, semi-transparent plastic dusted with clinging snowflakes, appearing pale and cold-white against the snow, edges fluttering and creased, stiffened slightly by the cold
subjects.relationship: Loose debris on the road ahead of the moving ego vehicle, harmless obstacles being ignored
subjects.location: center foreground to lower-center of frame, on the road ahead
subjects.orientation: Tumbling and shifting, no fixed orientation
subjects.pose: Crumpled and partially lifted, drifting along the asphalt
subjects.action: Being tossed and skittered across the road by gusts of wind
subjects.state_changes: Bags shift position, lift briefly, and tumble as the vehicle approaches and passes near them

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, implied by the first-person dashboard-level point of view, traveling forward along a snow-covered residential street
subjects.appearance_details: Front hood edge faintly visible at the bottom of the frame, windshield framing the view of the road ahead
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle whose perspective the entire video is shot from
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible lower frame
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road, aligned with the camera
subjects.pose: Driving steadily forward in its lane
subjects.action: Maintaining consistent speed and lane position
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; continues straight at constant speed

background_setting: A quiet Scandinavian residential street under a pale overcast winter sky, light snow falling and blanketing the roofs, gardens, and snow-packed roadway. Timber and rendered houses in muted reds and ochres line the street behind snow-laden bare birches. Tire tracks cut through the packed snow; the lane markings are hidden beneath it. Low fences and mailboxes wear caps of snow along the verge in the hushed winter air.

lighting.conditions: Overcast winter daylight with light falling snow
lighting.direction: Flat, diffuse light from the whole sky; no direct sun
lighting.shadows: Essentially shadowless; snow and sky scatter light evenly
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright but flat, high-key white illumination; the two translucent bags look pale and snow-flecked against the snow, catching stray flakes as they skitter over the packed white road

aesthetics.composition: First-person driving perspective with the snowy road vanishing toward a central point, hood edge anchoring the bottom, the two bags in the central foreground
aesthetics.color_scheme: Whites and pale greys of snow and sky, muted red-ochre houses, dark birch trunks, and pale snow-flecked bags
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Hushed, cold, calm snowy neighbourhood drive
aesthetics.patterns: Tire tracks in packed snow, snow-laden bare birches, and rows of low houses

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle, steady and smooth
cinematography.framing: Wide shot capturing the road ahead
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near snowy road and the two bags in the central foreground; falling snow softens the far background

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle ignoring harmless road debris

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives forward steadily along the snowy residential street; two stray polythene bags appear ahead on the packed snow, pale and snow-flecked as they flutter.
The vehicle continues at constant speed; the bags tumble and skitter across the snow-packed road as the gap closes.
The vehicle maintains its lane and speed, passing near the bags without deviation as they drift aside in the cold wind.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward on the snow-packed residential street under overcast snowfall; two pale polythene bags become visible ahead, tossed by the cold wind.
segments.key_changes: Bags appear in the central foreground, snow-flecked against the white road, and begin to flutter.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking from dashboard view.

segments.description: The vehicle holds speed and lane as the bags tumble across the snow-packed surface.
segments.key_changes: Bags shift and lift slightly in gusts, catching falling flakes.

segments.description: The vehicle maintains its course and passes near the bags, ignoring them entirely as they drift aside.
segments.key_changes: Bags pass out of central frame; the snowy road ahead stays clear.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward along a snow-covered Scandinavian residential street under pale overcast, light snow falling and tire tracks cut through the packed white road. Within the first two seconds, two translucent polythene bags come into view in the central foreground, pale and snow-flecked as they lift and flutter in the cold wind. From 0:02 to 0:03 the vehicle holds constant speed and lane position as the bags tumble and skitter across the snow-packed road. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle continues without deviation, passing near the bags and ignoring them as they drift aside, the snowy road ahead remaining clear under the flat winter light.
audio_description: Ambient hushed winter sounds: the low hum of the engine and the muffled crunch of tires on packed snow, sound deadened by the snowfall, faint neighbourhood quiet. No speech or music; the soft, cold-stiffened rustle of snow-flecked plastic bags in the wind.
